diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Healthcare Associated Pneumonia, Urinary Tract Infection
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: Patient presented with hypotension and respiratory failure. Evaluation revealed copious secretions, hypoxia, and intubation due to respiratory distress. Imaging showed mild pulmonary edema and possible atelectasis or pneumonia. Urine analysis indicated large blood and bacteria, suggesting a urinary tract infection. These findings supported the final diagnoses of Healthcare Associated Pneumonia and Urinary Tract Infection.
